title: Tomato Price Surge: ₹40-44 Per Kg, Expected to Hit ₹60
summary: Tomato prices in Dharmapuri jumped from ₹18-20 to ₹40-44 per kg. Expected to reach ₹60/kg due to heatwave destroying crops in Palacode and Rayakottai.

title: Rabid Dog Attack: 15 Persons Including Children Injured
summary: Fifteen people including children sustained injuries from a rabid dog attack in the old Harijan colony of Dharmapuri.

title: Health Camp Finally Held at Karapadi After Long Demand
summary: Medical health camp was conducted at Karapadi following prolonged demands from residents for basic healthcare services.

title: Anganwadi at Karapadi Remains Non-Functional
summary: Despite health camp, the Anganwadi (nutrition and early learning centre) in Karapadi continues to remain non-operational.

title: Dharmapuri Records 90.14% Turnout: Among Top Five TN Districts
summary: Dharmapuri achieved 90.14% voter participation, ranking among the top five districts in Tamil Nadu for polling percentage.

title: Former DMK MP's Temple Visit: Religious Shift in Political Career
summary: S. Senthil Kumar, former DMK MP who once opposed Hindu rituals, visited temple after receiving Palacode assembly ticket.

title: PMK Candidate Sowmiya Anbumani to Contest Dharmapuri Assembly Seat
summary: Pattali Makkal Katchi (PMK) nominated Sowmiya Anbumani as candidate for Dharmapuri assembly constituency in 2026 elections.

title: Echambadi Dam Delay: Villagers Threatened to Boycott Elections
summary: Villagers affected by Echambadi dam project had threatened election boycott over prolonged delays in project implementation.

title: Heavy Rain Warning for May 1-2 with Gusty Winds
summary: IMD warns of heavy rainfall with gusty winds expected in Dharmapuri on May 1-2, bringing relief from extreme heat.
